source.title: PURE study: dietary fats and cardiovascular disease across 18 countries
source.position: NEW:No clear effect of saturated fat on CVD risk

provenance.quote: The Prospective Urban Rural Epidemiology study enrolled 135,335 individuals across 18 countries.

position.quote: Saturated fat intake was not associated with cardiovascular disease or mortality.

source.title: Women's Health Initiative: low-fat dietary pattern and cardiovascular events
source.position: NEW:No clear effect of saturated fat on CVD risk

restsOn.ref: NEW:Women's Health Initiative dietary trial (48,835 women)

provenance.quote: The Women's Health Initiative randomly assigned 48,835 postmenopausal women to a low-fat diet or control.

position.quote: The low-fat dietary pattern did not significantly reduce the risk of coronary heart disease.
